creator: dan@langille.org
text:
Upgrade Bacula to 2.4.0
 http://marc.info/?l=bacula-announce&m=121266127519899&w=2
 
> How-To-Repeat:
> Fix:

 This PR contains patches for  both bacula-server and bacula-docs
 
 --- bacula-server.2.4.0.patch begins here ---
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-server/Makefile bacula-server/ 
 Makefile
 --- /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-server/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:45:16 2008
 +++ bacula-server/Makefile	Thu Jun  5 09:44:56 2008
 @@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
   #
 
   PORTNAME=	bacula
 -DISTVERSION=	2.2.8
 -PORTREVISION=	2
 +DISTVERSION=	2.4.0
 +#PORTREVISION=	2
   CATEGORIES=	sysutils
   MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
   MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	bacula
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-server/distinfo bacula-server/ 
 distinfo
 --- /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-server/distinfo	Tue Jan 29 05:47:40 2008
 +++ bacula-server/distinfo	Thu Jun  5 09:45:01 2008
 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 -MD5 (bacula-2.2.8.tar.gz) = 4547d0bf9f976d5d9ea5f21a7bd078ee
 -SHA256 (bacula-2.2.8.tar.gz) =  
 0859e285be9693bcd18de8e7b69b922bbc0b6400a7eaddfb4a7b2c1168e3a4ca
 -SIZE (bacula-2.2.8.tar.gz) = 3063481
 +MD5 (bacula-2.4.0.tar.gz) = c851f97c1836ab212f33b9159ed526c2
 +SHA256 (bacula-2.4.0.tar.gz) =  
 856430e271dc151528a47ae82e89cd21fa5c720ab5be3f698ed754a8cc25520a
 +SIZE (bacula-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 3082403
 --- bacula-server.2.4.0.patch ends here ---
 
 --- bacula-docs.2.4.0.patch begins here ---
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-docs/Makefile bacula-docs/Makefile
 --- /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-docs/Makefile	Tue Jan 29 05:47:40 2008
 +++ bacula-docs/Makefile	Thu Jun  5 09:23:49 2008
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
   #
 
   PORTNAME=	bacula
 -PORTVERSION=	2.2.8
 +PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
   CATEGORIES=	sysutils
   MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
   MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	bacula
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-docs/distinfo bacula-docs/distinfo
 --- /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-docs/distinfo	Tue Jan 29 05:47:40 2008
 +++ bacula-docs/distinfo	Thu Jun  5 09:44:28 2008
 @@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 -MD5 (bacula-docs-2.2.8.tar.bz2) = 9cc38ace92d52c7bebbbfc2ed5507b79
 -SHA256 (bacula-docs-2.2.8.tar.bz2) =  
 a7a5f9f323d35994fa1951b34908e1fedf5538ff298e4b6bde87077c32eb8047
 -SIZE (bacula-docs-2.2.8.tar.bz2) = 23128862
 -MD5 (bacula-2.2.8.tar.gz) = 4547d0bf9f976d5d9ea5f21a7bd078ee
 -SHA256 (bacula-2.2.8.tar.gz) =  
 0859e285be9693bcd18de8e7b69b922bbc0b6400a7eaddfb4a7b2c1168e3a4ca
 -SIZE (bacula-2.2.8.tar.gz) = 3063481
 +MD5 (bacula-docs-2.4.0.tar.bz2) = aee481a6356c1599a5336f3040efa65f
 +SHA256 (bacula-docs-2.4.0.tar.bz2) =  
 7b1a87559a5cd1b2b702149e76b59b6e1234397f0dbe08c719bcc52aa06714f3
 +SIZE (bacula-docs-2.4.0.tar.bz2) = 23005131
 +MD5 (bacula-2.4.0.tar.gz) = c851f97c1836ab212f33b9159ed526c2
 +SHA256 (bacula-2.4.0.tar.gz) =  
 856430e271dc151528a47ae82e89cd21fa5c720ab5be3f698ed754a8cc25520a
 +SIZE (bacula-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 3082403
 --- bacula-docs.2.4.0.patch ends here ---
